description: Tabular data operations powered by Polars

read_csv.name: Read CSV
read_csv.description: Read a CSV file into a named DataFrame

read_excel.name: Read Excel
read_excel.description: Read an Excel file into a named DataFrame

read_json.name: Read JSON
read_json.description: Read a JSON file into a named DataFrame

from_list.name: From List
from_list.description: Create a DataFrame from a list of dicts

write_csv.name: Write CSV
write_csv.description: Write a DataFrame to a CSV file

write_excel.name: Write Excel
write_excel.description: Write a DataFrame to an Excel file

write_json.name: Write JSON
write_json.description: Write a DataFrame to a JSON file

get_shape.name: Get Shape
get_shape.description: Return the number of rows and columns

get_columns.name: Get Columns
get_columns.description: Return the list of column names

to_list.name: To List
to_list.description: Convert the entire DataFrame to a list of dicts

describe.name: Describe
describe.description: Return descriptive statistics for all columns

filter_rows.name: Filter Rows
filter_rows.description: Filter rows by a column condition

slice_rows.name: Slice Rows
slice_rows.description: Return a slice of rows by offset and length

sort.name: Sort
sort.description: Sort a DataFrame by one or more columns

drop_nulls.name: Drop Nulls
drop_nulls.description: Remove rows that contain null values

fill_nulls.name: Fill Nulls
fill_nulls.description: Replace null values with the given value

aggregate.name: Aggregate
aggregate.description: Compute a single aggregation over a column

group_by.name: Group By
group_by.description: Group by columns and aggregate another column

join.name: Join
join.description: Join two DataFrames on common columns

list_frames.name: List Frames
list_frames.description: Return the names of all DataFrames in memory

copy_frame.name: Copy Frame
copy_frame.description: Create a copy of a DataFrame under a new name
